title: StatusPreflightSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``status-preflight`` composite primitive (WS5 #3, lowest-hanging variant).

Collapses the boilerplate at the top of ``hpc-status`` — Step 0
(install-commands) and Step 1 (load-context) — into one CLI call.
No ``reconcile`` branch (only submit/aggregate have that), so this is
the simplest of the ``<skill>-preflight`` family and a clean prototype
for the pattern.

The agent's prose-discipline at the top of every status invocation is
replaced by one verb that runs the same deterministic sequence — no
risk of skipping Step 0 (the entire 0.10.2 release was motivated by
that exact failure).

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory.

skip.title: Skip
skip.description: Sub-calls to skip. Mostly useful in tests where the install-commands network round-trip is already known fresh; in production callers should pass an empty list.

timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec
timeout_sec.description: Per-sub-call subprocess timeout. install-commands is a local filesystem operation (<1s typical); load-context can touch ``~/.claude/hpc/`` and clusters.yaml (single-digit seconds).
